case_title: ROSALIO FLORES VS. SPECTRUM PAINTING & DECORATING INC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLORES, ROSALIO AS TO DEFENDANT SPECTRUM PAINTING & DECORATING INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FLORES, ROSALIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPECTRUM PAINTING & DECORATING INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $11,096.63 PRINCIPAL, $55.58 INTEREST, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,452.21, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
